news.title: OpenAI shakes up partnership with Microsoft, capping revenue share payments
news.summary: Microsoft and OpenAI announced a broad agreement following OpenAI's restructuring in October. Things have changed since the two companies announced the broad agreement.

news.title: Iran reportedly proposes Hormuz Strait deal to U.S. Here’s where things stand — and what’s next for markets
news.summary: U.S.-Iran peace talks stall. Here's where things stand — and what's next for markets. U.S. and Iran have been at odds for years over the Middle East.

news.title: Qualcomm up 7% on report it’s partnering with OpenAI on smartphone AI chip
news.summary: Qualcomm will be working alongside MediaTek to develop a smartphone chip for OpenAI. Luxshare co-designing the device, an analyst said.

news.title: This bank CEO let his AI clone handle an earnings call — now he's signing an OpenAI deal
news.summary: Customers Bank CEO Sam Sidhu's effort to get ahead in the industry's race to transform itself using AI agents as a new digital workforce.

news.title: China blocks Meta's $2 billion takeover of AI startup Manus
news.summary: China blocks Meta's $2 billion acquisition of Manus, a Singaporean AI startup with Chinese roots. China said Monday it has decided to block Meta's acquisition.

news.title: Microsoft and OpenAI aren’t breaking up. But they’re not exclusive anymore.
news.summary: The companies agreed to a deal that they said gives them more flexibility. As part of it, Microsoft will stop sharing its revenue with Facebook.

news.title: A record 20 million single women own homes — even though it’s more expensive for a woman to buy a house than a man
news.summary: The majority of home buyers are married couples. 21% today are single women, compared to just 9% of single men. The majority of single women are buying their first home.

news.title: Apple is defying a global smartphone slump, as shown through this first-time feat
news.summary: Apple claimed the top global smartphone spot for the first time in a March quarter thanks to the success of the iPhone 17e and nifty supply-chain moves.

news.title: Want the lowest mortgage rate you can get? Credit-scoring changes mean home buyers need a new strategy.
news.summary: How to make the most of the new math coming for your credit score. How to get the most out of your credit card. What to do if you get a bad credit report. What do you do? Share your story.

news.title: Zuckerberg is following Musk’s lead with this ‘transformative step’ in outer space
news.summary: Meta said it plans to source space-based solar energy from a newly launched startup with unproven technology. Meta plans to build a solar farm in the middle of space.
